Interface WalletTransactionRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<WalletTransaction,UUID>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<WalletTransaction,UUID>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaSpecificationExecutor<WalletTransaction>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<WalletTransaction,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<WalletTransaction,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<WalletTransaction,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<WalletTransaction>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<WalletTransaction,UUID>
@Repository public interface WalletTransactionRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<WalletTransaction,UUID>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaSpecificationExecutor<WalletTransaction>

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaSpecificationExecutor

    org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaSpecificationExecutor.SpecificationFluentQuery<T>

  • Method Details

    • findWalletTransactionsById

      WalletTransaction findWalletTransactionsById(UUID id)

    • findWalletTransactionsByWalletId

      WalletTransaction findWalletTransactionsByWalletId(UUID userId)

    • findWalletTransactionByType

      WalletTransaction findWalletTransactionByType(TransactionType type)

    • findWalletTransactionByReferenceId

      List<WalletTransaction> findWalletTransactionByReferenceId(UUID referenceId)

    • existByWalletIdAndTransactionTypeAndReferenceId

      @Query("SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(wt) > 0 THEN true ELSE false END FROM WalletTransaction wt WHERE wt.wallet.id = :walletId AND wt.type = :type AND wt.referenceId = :referenceId") boolean existByWalletIdAndTransactionTypeAndReferenceId(@Param("walletId") UUID walletId, @Param("type") TransactionType type, @Param("referenceId") UUID referenceId)

    • findWalletTransactionByUser

      @Query("SELECT wt FROM WalletTransaction wt WHERE wt.wallet.user.id = :userId ORDER BY wt.createdDate DESC") List<WalletTransaction> findWalletTransactionByUser(@Param("userId") UUID userId)

    • sumEarnedPointsByUserId

      @Query("SELECT SUM(wt.netReceivedAmount) FROM WalletTransaction wt WHERE wt.wallet.user.id = :userId AND wt.type = 'SALE'") BigDecimal sumEarnedPointsByUserId(@Param("userId") UUID userId)

    • sumSpentPointsByUserId

      @Query("SELECT SUM(wt.amount) FROM WalletTransaction wt WHERE wt.wallet.user.id = :userId AND (wt.type = 'PURCHASE' OR wt.type = 'SUBSCRIBE')") BigDecimal sumSpentPointsByUserId(@Param("userId") UUID userId)
